headline: Panasonic to start US data centre battery production by fiscal 2028
summary: Panasonic Holdings said on Monday it plans to ‌start mass production of battery ‌cells for data centre applications at a plant ​in the U.S. state of Kansas in the financial year 2028, which ends March 2029.  • Panasonic Energy also plans to build a third plant in Mexico with mass production scheduled for the fiscal year 2028.  • Panasonic ‌Energy CEO Kazuo Tadanobu ​said the unit's 950 ​billion yen ​sales target for data centre-related ‌energy storage systems in ​the 2028 ​financial year was a "minimum commitment", adding that the business would aim to ​lift sales ‌to more than 1 trillion yen.

content.title: Panasonic to start US data centre battery production by fiscal 2028
content.summary: Panasonic Holdings said on Monday it plans to ‌start mass production of battery ‌cells for data centre applications at a plant ​in the U.S. state of Kansas in the financial year 2028, which ends March 2029.  • Panasonic Energy also plans to build a third plant in Mexico with mass production scheduled for the fiscal year 2028.  • Panasonic ‌Energy CEO Kazuo Tadanobu ​said the unit's 950 ​billion yen ​sales target for data centre-related ‌energy storage systems in ​the 2028 ​financial year was a "minimum commitment", adding that the business would aim to ​lift sales ‌to more than 1 trillion yen.

headline: Should You Buy SpaceX Stock This Week? Bull, Bear Arguments, and Red Herrings.
summary: Depending on who investors read, the SpaceX IPO will either end Western civilization while ruining working-class retirement funds or usher in an AI-enabled global utopia, generating trillions in profits.  For bullish investors, including Baron Capital and ARK Invest, the projected $1.8 trillion valuation for SpaceX feels like a bargain for three main reasons.

headline: Tesla Stock Rises Ahead of SpaceX’s Friday IPO
summary: Shares of the electric-vehicle maker were up 1.4% at $396.65 in premarket trading, while  futures were up 0.4% and  futures were down 0.1%.  Investors are waiting to see if some investors will sell Tesla stock to buy SpaceX shares.  Technical factors like that can create short-term price distortions.

headline: Latest News In Electric Vehicles - Innovative Tool Enhances Design Efficiency for Onsemi Solutions
summary: onsemi has unveiled its Elite Pairing Studio, an innovative online design tool aimed at optimizing power electronics applications, including those used in electric vehicles. This first-of-its-kind platform facilitates the pairing of silicon carbide (SiC) MOSFETs and gate drivers, offering engineers enhanced visibility into device-level behavior to make more informed design decisions early in the development process. The Studio aims to reduce design iterations and risks by enabling efficient...
